The Embarcadero is the major harbor road on the east coast of San Francisco. The worth seeing section runs from the historic Ferry Building up to Fisherman’s Wharf and is ideal for a longer walk along the bay. Along the way, you can stop at various piers, enjoy the views or stop at one of the cafes and restaurants. The largest and best selection can be found in the Ferry Building.

A very long stretch that runs along the Bay from Oracle Park to Fisherman's Wharf.  The objective here is to take a very long walk to see the water, some splendid parks and outdoor art, a good market and lots of piers that have been recycled to different uses.  On a pleasant day, you will find lots of people out and about.
